info.title: Rooiam API
info.description: Self-hosted passwordless IAM for multi-tenant SaaS.

200.description: JSON Web Key Set for verifying issued ID tokens
OIDC discovery document (issuer, endpoints, supported algs)
Session revoked and cookie cleared (idempotent)
Magic-link email queued (response does not reveal whether the email exists)
Token accepted; sets the session cookie and returns the signed-in user / next step (e.g. MFA)

get.summary: Retrieve the active user's current identity profile

200.description: The signed-in user's profile
The signed-in user's own audit log (paginated)

requestBody.description: Multipart form with an image file field

200.description: Avatar uploaded; returns the new avatar URL + updated profile

400.description: Missing/invalid image or file too large

delete.summary:
DELETE /v1/identity/me/delete/confirm
Step 2: Permanently delete the account after email confirmation.
Revokes all sessions and OIDC tokens, anonymizes audit logs, removes org
memberships, and hard-deletes the user row.

200.description: Account permanently deleted; session ended

post.summary:
POST /v1/identity/me/delete/request
Step 1: Send a confirmation email before account deletion. Token expires in 1 hour.

200.description: Account-deletion confirmation email sent

post.summary:
POST /v1/identity/me/email-change/request
Sends a verification link to the new email address.

200.description: Verification link sent to the new email

post.summary:
POST /v1/identity/me/email-change/verify
Confirms the email change by consuming the token.

200.description: Email changed; returns the new primary email
Linked OAuth providers + which can be unlinked
Provider unlinked

400.description: Cannot unlink the last login method

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: OAuth provider, e.g. google or microsoft

200.description: Returns an authorization_url to redirect the user to for linking

patch.summary: Update the active user's identity profile

200.description: Updated profile
The signed-in user's active sessions
All other sessions revoked
Session revoked
TOTP enrolled during login; completes sign-in (sets session) + returns backup codes
First-login TOTP enrollment context (secret + otpauth URI)
MFA code accepted; completes sign-in and sets the session cookie
New backup codes (old ones invalidated)
TOTP enrollment status + remaining backup codes
TOTP disabled; other sessions revoked
TOTP enabled; returns one-time backup codes
TOTP secret + otpauth URI + challenge_id for totp/finish

302.description: Redirect: to login if no session, else back to the client's redirect_uri with an authorization code (or an error)

get.description:
Clears the Rooiam session cookie and revokes the DB session.
Redirects to `post_logout_redirect_uri` only when it matches the registered app callback
(`redirect_uri`) values for the provided client_id.
Validates `id_token_hint` format if provided but does not require it (many RPs don't send it).

302.description: RP-initiated logout: ends the session and redirects to post_logout_redirect_uri if valid

200.description: Token introspection response (RFC 7662): { active, ... }
Token revoked (always 200 per RFC 7009, even for unknown tokens)
Token response: access_token, id_token, optional refresh_token
Claims for the user the access token was issued for
Workspace activity (audit) log
Metadata + granted permissions for the calling API key

403.description: API key lacks the workspace.read permission

credential.description: The raw WebAuthn `PublicKeyCredential` from the browser's `navigator.credentials.create()`.

oidc_access_token.description: OIDC access token from /oidc/token, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

session_cookie.name: rooiam_session
session_cookie.description: Opaque session cookie set on magic-link verify; sent automatically by the browser.

workspace_api_key.description: Workspace API key, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.
